name: AFFILIATED MANAGERS GROUP, INC.
business: AMG is a strategic partner to leading independent investment firms globally, providing growth capital, product strategy, distribution, and succession planning. The company generates revenue primarily from asset-based and performance-based fees earned by its Affiliates. It serves institutional and individual clients through a diverse range of alternative and long-only investment strategies.

exposures.sentence: We also announced a strategic partnership with BBH, a privately held global financial services firm, to acquire a minority equity interest in BBH Credit Partners, a newly formed subsidiary of BBH focused on structured and alternative credit investment strategies.
Our Affiliates managed approximately $146 billion in private market assets.
Our Affiliates managed approximately $227 billion in liquid alternative assets.

AMG's partnership model provides Affiliates access to its vertically-integrated U.S. wealth platform, which includes product development expertise, an operations team supporting all aspects of the product lifecycle, and a scaled distribution organization.
Montefiore, a European private equity firm focused on the services sector.
NorthBridge Partners, a private markets manager specializing in industrial logistics real estate assets.
Qualitas Energy, a renewables-focused global infrastructure manager specializing in energy transition.

catalysts.event: Completed minority investment in NorthBridge Partners
catalysts.sentence: In the first quarter of 2025, we completed our minority investment in NorthBridge Partners, LLC (NorthBridge), a private markets manager specializing in industrial logistics real estate assets.

catalysts.event: Completed minority investment in Verition Fund Management
catalysts.sentence: In the second quarter of 2025, we completed our minority investment in Verition Fund Management LLC (Verition), a global multi-strategy investment firm.

catalysts.event: Completed minority investment in Montefiore Investment
catalysts.sentence: In the fourth quarter of 2025, we completed our minority investments in Montefiore Investment (Montefiore), a European private equity firm focused on the services sector.

catalysts.event: Completed minority investment in Qualitas Energy
catalysts.sentence: In the fourth quarter of 2025, we completed our minority investments in ... Qualitas Energy, a renewables-focused global infrastructure manager specializing in energy transition.

catalysts.event: Completed sale of minority interest in Peppertree
catalysts.sentence: In the third quarter of 2025, we completed the sale of our minority equity interest in Peppertree Capital Management, Inc. (Peppertree), as part of the announced acquisition of Peppertree by TPG Inc.

catalysts.event: Completed sale of Comvest private credit business
catalysts.sentence: In November 2025, Comvest Partners (Comvest) completed the previously announced agreement to sell its private credit business to Manulife Financial Corporation.
In December 2025, we completed the sale of our minority equity interest in Montrusco Bolton Investments Inc. (Montrusco Bolton) to Walter Global Asset Management Inc.
On December 11, 2025, we issued $425.0 million of 2036 senior unsecured notes with a maturity date of February 15, 2036.

catalysts.event: Completed strategic partnership with BBH Credit Partners
catalysts.sentence: The transaction was completed in January 2026.

catalysts.event: Completed additional minority investment in Garda Capital Partners
catalysts.sentence: On February 12, 2026, we announced the completion of our additional minority investment in Garda Capital Partners LP (Garda).

catalysts.event: Completed minority investment in HighBrook Investors
catalysts.sentence: On February 12, 2026, we announced ... our minority investment in HighBrook Investors (HighBrook).
In January 2026, we settled each of our conversion obligations with respect to our junior convertible securities in cash for an aggregate amount of $514.6 million.
